name: Union Trades
description_short: Union Trades FCU is a member-owned federal credit union offering auto loans, personal loans, credit cards, and digital banking services to its members.
description_long:
Union Trades Federal Credit Union (UTFCU) is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving members through both in-person and digital channels. Based on their website, the organization operates as a traditional credit union with a physical location in West Virginia (304 area code) and provides comprehensive financial products to its membership.

The institution offers a range of lending products including auto loans (new and used vehicles) starting at 4.50% APR, personal loans beginning at 9.50% APR, recreational loans from 5.25% APR, and Visa credit cards with rates starting at 10.99% APR. Members can also access certificate of deposit (CD) products and deposit accounts. The credit union prominently features seasonal promotions such as skip-a-payment programs during summer months, which may provide payment relief under certain eligibility conditions.

Union Trades distinguishes itself through a digital-first approach combined with in-person service options. The institution has invested in mobile banking capabilities including remote deposit capture, mobile app access (iOS and Android), online banking portal with bill pay functionality, account transfer capabilities, and real-time account alerts. Their emphasis on environmental sustainability through e-statement options and the convenience of appointment-based in-person service reflects a modern credit union model.

As a credit union, Union Trades serves member interests rather than external shareholders. However, potential members should verify eligibility requirements for membership, as credit unions typically require field of membership criteria. The advertised interest rates appear competitive within their market, though the website does not provide comprehensive fee schedules, term lengths, or detailed product comparison information that would enable full competitive assessment.
services: Auto loans (new and used vehicles) at 4.50% APR and up
Visa credit cards with rates from 10.99% APR
Online banking with bill pay functionality
Mobile banking app with remote deposit capture
Account alerts for low balance and unauthorized transactions
Loan application portal and online account access
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.50% APR for new and used vehicles
Comprehensive mobile banking with iOS and Android apps including remote deposit and bill pay
Seasonal skip-a-payment programs available June-August for eligible borrowers
Full-service digital banking platform with account transfers, alerts, and e-statements
Low personal loan rates beginning at 9.50% APR
Member-owned not-for-profit structure returns profits to members rather than shareholders
Multi-channel service with both online banking and in-person appointment scheduling
cons: Membership eligibility requirements unclear on website—credit union field of membership not specified
No fee schedule, loan terms, or APR ranges displayed beyond promotional rates
Limited product detail provided—CD rates advertised as 'view rates' but not shown on homepage
No information about minimum deposits, loan amounts, or approval requirements
Geographic service area and branch locations not clearly outlined on website
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto financing with rates under 5% APR
Borrowers who prefer member-owned institutions and digital banking convenience
Individuals needing temporary payment relief through seasonal skip-a-payment programs
Consumers wanting multi-product relationships including loans, cards, and savings accounts
diagnosis: Union Trades FCU is best suited for borrowers who are eligible for credit union membership and seek competitive loan rates combined with modern digital banking convenience. The main caveat is that membership eligibility criteria are not disclosed on the website, so potential customers must verify whether they qualify before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Union Trades — Credit Union in Parkersburg, WV | CreditDoc
meta_description: Union Trades — NCUA-insured credit union in Parkersburg, WV. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
